esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
// Scope to MongoDB OTel metrics
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.mongodb.cursor.timeout.count IS NOT NULL
// Delta over time window (metric is non-monotonic sum; increase indicates new timeouts)
| STATS min_val = MIN(metrics.mongodb.cursor.timeout.count), max_val = MAX(metrics.mongodb.cursor.timeout.count) BY resource.attributes.server.address
| EVAL new_timeouts = max_val - min_val
// Alert on any new cursor timeouts (clients unable to consume results in time)
| WHERE new_timeouts > 0
| SORT new_timeouts DESC
| LIMIT 20
